title: EGO & EGO
description: This is lobotomy corporation , library of ruina and limbus company mod.
body:
**This mod is lobotomy corporation , library of ruina and limbus company mod.**
This is a remake of a mod I made a long time ago.
We will add original EGO and other original EGO.

I am using Google Translate so it may not be accurate.

ーーーーー**debuff**－－－－－ーー－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－－

- **burn**　
Depends on Minecraft's existing burn time and adds that value of time.
 1st stage: Deals 2 damage every 3 seconds and reduces burning time by 5 seconds when burn occurs for 20 to 40 seconds.
2nd stage: Deals 4 damage every 3 seconds and reduces burning time by 5 seconds during burn 40 to 60 seconds.
Third stage: When the burn lasts for 80 seconds or more, deals 10 damage every 5 seconds and reduces the burning time by 10 seconds.

- **bleed**
When dashing or attacking, the duration of the effect will be reduced by 10 seconds by the strength of the effect (every second when dashing)

- **Tremor**
Tremor
- **Tremor Burst**
Reduces the maximum amount of confusion resistance by the strength of the effect and reduces the duration by 1 minute.

- **Rupture**
When attacked, take damage equal to the strength of the effect and reduce the duration by 2 seconds.

- **Sinking**
When you are attacked, you will be damaged by the confusion resistance value equal to the strength of the effect and the duration will be reduced by 2 seconds.

- **Poise**
If you attack while you have 5 Poise, you will deal an additional 8 damage and remove your Poise.

- **Charge**
When the effect time runs out, reduce the strength of the effect and restore the effect time to the original value.
